title: Elite Defensive Prospect’s NFL Draft Stock is ‘Sinking’
description: One of the top-ranked CBs in the 2026 NFL draft class could fall further than some initially thought.

title: Ex-Ohio State president Ted Carter’s girlfriend would sneak through campus garage to get to his office, report reveals
description: Carter – married to Lynda Carter for nearly 45 years – admitted giving Vlachos "inappropriate access" to university leadership and public resources to boost her private business when he voluntarily resigned.

title: Phone tracking shows how Colombian mercenaries backed Sudan's RSF - report
description: The Conflict Insights Group (CIG) says its research also shows the extent of UAE involvement.

title: Dan Eggen, who shaped politics coverage at The Post, dies at 60 - The Washington Post
description: Dan Eggen, who shaped politics coverage at The Post, dies at 60  The Washington Post

title: Mets Fans React After Team Blows Late Lead in 12th Straight Loss
description: New York Mets fans have brought out the paper bags as the team dropped its 12th straight game, this time at home at Citi Field.

title: ‘The GOP should’ve done more’: Virginia Republicans point fingers after gerrymandering loss
description: They are frustrated the party didn’t spend extensively and are putting pressure on Florida to give them back an edge.

title: University of Wisconsin scientist allegedly tried to poison rival lab colleague over promotion: ‘I did it’
description: The jealous scientist used ChatGPT on his work laptop to calculate the dosage for the poisoning plot.

title: Twins, Charlotte FC troll Mets as embarrassing losing streak hits 12
description: The Twins took to social media on Tuesday night after they defeated the Amazins 5-3 in Queens to poke fun at the Mets’ 12th straight loss.
